case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. VICTOR MANUEL COB SIMA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR MANUEL COB SIMA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,196.36 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SIMA, VICTOR MANUEL COB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED JUL-03-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SIMA, VICTOR MANUEL COB
